description_long: This object consists of three identical blue barrels arranged side by side. Each barrel is cylindrical with a flat top and bottom, and features a prominent yellow warning symbol with a black border on the front, suggesting hazardous contents. The barrels have black and yellow striped banding near the top and bottom edges, which further emphasizes caution. The surface appears to be made of metal, with a matte finish and some visible wear or scuff marks. There are no visible handles or openings, and the tops are solid, indicating the barrels are sealed. These barrels are commonly found in industrial or urban environments, often used for storing chemicals or waste.
description: Three blue cylindrical barrels with yellow hazard symbols and black-yellow striped bands, likely metal and sealed, commonly used for hazardous materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow hazard symbols and black-yellow striped bands on all three barrels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain blue sides of the barrels with no visible markings or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unmarked blue surfaces of the barrels, with no symbols or labels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain blue sides and the tops of the barrels.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black-yellow striped bands near top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow hazard symbol with black border
